items.name: John Carlo Gamayo
items.summary: Results-driven Full-Stack Software Developer specializing in building AI-embedded systems, SaaS applications, and scalable web platforms. Experienced in designing and deploying intelligent applications using LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and automation workflows. Proven ability to contribute to system architecture, AI pipelines, API integrations, and real-world business solutions. Recognized for strong ownership, fast learning ability, and a systems-thinking mindset.
education: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology, Bulacan State University - Bustos Campus, 2022 - 2026
ICT Strand, Immaculate Conception School of Sta. Maria, Bulacan, 2020 - 2022
items.raw_text: 1/2  JOHN CARLO GAMAYO  Full-Stack Software Developer  Bulacan, Philippines   I   +63 911 352 900   I   johncarlogamayo@gmail.com  Portfolio: johncarlogamayo.netlify.app   I   GitHub: github.com/johncarlogamayo  PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY  Results-driven Full-Stack Software Developer specializing in building AI-embedded systems, SaaS applications, and scalable   web   platforms.   Experienced   in   designing   and   deploying   intelligent   applications   using   LLMs,   Retrieval - Augmented Generation (RAG), and automation workflows. Proven ability to go beyond typical development roles by contributing   to   system   architecture,   AI   pipelines,   API   integrations,   and   real-world   business   solutions.   Adept   at translating complex technical systems into practical, user-focused applications. Recognized for strong ownership, fast learning ability, and a systems-thinking mindset aligned with modern AI-driven development practices.  TECHNICAL SKILLS  Languages:  Frameworks   &   Libraries:  Web   &   Mobile:  Al   &   Machine learning:  Web & Systems Development:  Cloud & Infrastructure:  Core Competencies:  JavaScript, Typescript, Python, SQL, C#  React, Node.js, FastAPI, Django  REST APls, Webhooks, Android Development, Unity  OCR, LLMs, RAG, Embeddings, Knowledge Bases, Prompt Engineering, AI Workflow Design  REST APIs, Webhooks, SaaS Development, Full-Stack Systems  Cloudflare, Reverse Proxy, PostgreSQL, Environment Configuration System Architecture, API Integration, Debugging, Testing, UI/UX Design  PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE  Software Developer Intern  Lightweight Global Tech Solution Corp   /   Quezon City, Philippines December 2025   -   March 2026  •   Developed and maintained full-stack web applications using Typescript, React, Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL for internal and client-facing systems  •   Implemented OCR-based document processing pipelines, automating data extraction from scanned and handwritten documents and mapping outputs into structured PDFs  •   Enhanced OCR accuracy through prompt rules, positional logic, and validation to prevent duplicate or incorrect data mapping  •   Integrated Al-powered features including embeddings, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and knowledge base workflows  •   Designed and implemented multi-platform messaging integrations (Facebook Messenger, lnstagram DM, WhatsApp) using Meta Graph API and webhook architecture  •   Built secure webhook handlers with HMAC-SHA256 signature validation, environment-based configuration, and structured logging  •   Configured Cloudflare reverse proxy and tunnels for local-to-public webhook testing and production readiness  •   Fixed critical backend and frontend issues across authentication, email verification, API keys management, file uploads, and real-time streaming responses  •   Participated in system architecture discussions, database schema updates, migrations, and deployment preparation  •   Authored technical documentation for integrations, testing workflows, and setup guides for internal developers and future clients  •   Regularly presented development updates to senior leadership, including CTO and CEO, and proposed architectural improvements  PROJECTS  Eveia - Al-Powered Saas Platform   I   Internal Product at Lightweight Global Tech Solution Corp  •   Contributed to the development of an Al-powered Saas platform for document processing, knowledge bases, and business messaging automation  •   Implemented OCR pipelines to extract structured data from scanned and handwritten documents  •   Integrated Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using embeddings for Al knowledge retrieval  •   Developed and tested secure webhook integrations for Facebook Messenger, lnstagram Direct Messages, and WhatsApp Business  •   Improved backend stability, streaming responses, API key management, and timezone handling  Scholarly Aether   —   AI-Powered Research SaaS Platform  •   Designed and deployed a web-based AI system for researchers with knowledge base creation and intelligent querying  •   Implemented RAG architecture for accurate AI responses based on structured data  •   Built features for data ingestion, document processing, and AI summarization  •   Designed system to be model-agnostic using OpenAI-compatible APIs for scalability and flexibility  DriveWise - Gamified Driving Simulation App   I   Unity,   C#,   Mobile Application  •   Developed a mobile driving simulation game focused on real-world traffic scenarios and road safety  •   Implemented interactive gameplay mechanics, scoring systems, vehicle physics, and user progression  •   Published on Google Play Store with analytics and user feedback integration  3/2  PC Bulacan - E-Commerce System   I   Full-Stack Web Application  •   Built a complete e-commerce platform including product catalog, shopping cart, checkout flow, and role-based authentication  •   Implemented backend order management and payment simulation using RESTful APls  •   Designed database schema and admin workflows for inventory and order tracking  CyberZone - E-Commerce Website   I   UI Design, Backend Development  •   Designed and implemented a modern UI for product management, order tracking, and inventory control  •   Developed secure backend logic for order processing and catalog management  •   Integrated admin dashboards for monitoring orders, products, and stock levels  BigBrew - Online Coffee Management System   I   Web-based Management System  •   Developed an online coffee shop management system with admin dashboard reporting  •   Implemented dynamic pricing, product categorization, and image management features  •   Built CRUD workflows for products, categories, and orders with clean, modern UI  EDUCATION  Bulacan State University   –   Bustos Campus   2022   –   2026  •   Bachelor of Science in Information Technology  Immaculate Conception School of Sta. Maria, Bulacan   2020   –   2022  •   ICT Strand (Senior High School)  ADDITIONAL INFORMATION  •   AI & Machine Learning Practitioner with hands-on experience building real-world systems  •   Experienced in designing AI-integrated applications from concept to deployment  •   Strong focus on secure, scalable, and user-centered system design  REFERENCES  Danward Bautista - Senior Software Developer  📞   0945 992 2705  ✉️  danwarddeveloper@gmail.com  🌐   danwardbautista.com
